creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 204209
patch

Remove devel/qt5/files/extrapatch-mkspecs_freebsd-g++_qmake.conf, it's not needed.

Copy devel/qt5/files/extrapatch-mkspecs_common_bsd_bsd.conf to devel/qt5/files/extrapatch-mkspecs_common_bsd_bsd.conf-gcc and add:
EXTRA_INCLUDEPATH     += %%LOCALBASE%%/lib/gcc%%GCC_DEFAULT%%/include %%LOCALBASE%%/lib/gcc%%GCC_DEFAULT%%/include/c++

Move devel/qt5/files/extrapatch-mkspecs_common_bsd_bsd.conf to devel/qt5/files/extrapatch-mkspecs_common_bsd_bsd.conf-clang and apply on Clang architectures.

I compiled qt5-core on amd64 and powerpc64, seems to build fine.
